summary: Iteration 120 - Revenue Analytics Dashboard & Watermark Service Testing. All 25 backend tests passed (3 skipped due to test user unavailable). Frontend Revenue Analytics Dashboard fully functional with all 5 tabs, export buttons, filters, and admin navigation working correctly.

issues: Card labels (Total Revenue, Subscription Revenue, etc.) have low contrast with their colored backgrounds

backend_revenue_analytics.notes: Returns comprehensive revenue summary with totals, requires admin auth
Returns breakdown by subscription type (weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly)
Returns breakdown by top-up type (starter, creator, pro)
Returns paginated transaction list with filters
Returns top paying users sorted by total spent

backend_watermark.notes: Returns shouldApply=false for admin (paid plan), requires auth

frontend_revenue_dashboard.notes: 7 summary cards displayed: Total Revenue, Subscription Revenue, Top-up Revenue, Active Subscribers, Pending Payments, Failed Payments, Refunded
All 5 tabs working: Overview, Transactions, Trends, Top Users, By Location
Shows Subscription Breakdown, Top-up Breakdown, Most Purchased Products
Shows transaction table with filters (status, type), pagination working
Shows Revenue Over Time chart with Day/Week/Month/Year period selectors
Displays empty state (no top users with payments in test data)
Displays empty state (no location data in test data)
CSV export button visible and clickable
Excel export button visible and clickable
Start and end date pickers visible in header
Revenue button in Admin Dashboard header navigates to /app/admin/revenue

critical_code_review_comments: Revenue Analytics Dashboard fully implemented with all requested features
All admin-only endpoints properly protected with get_admin_user dependency
Watermark service correctly returns shouldApply=false for paid users and admins
CSV and Excel export functionality working correctly
Date filtering and pagination implemented for transactions
Minor console warning about HTML hydration (<tr> cannot be child of <span>) - cosmetic issue only
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - testing existing production data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 120 tested Revenue Analytics Dashboard (/app/admin/revenue) and Watermark service. All backend APIs working correctly: summary, subscriptions, topups, trends, transactions, top-users, by-location, export/csv, export/excel. Frontend dashboard has 5 tabs (Overview, Transactions, Trends, Top Users, By Location), CSV/Excel export buttons, date filters. Admin Dashboard has Revenue button in header linking to revenue analytics. Watermark /api/watermark/should-apply returns shouldApply based on user plan and payment history. Note: Test data shows ₹24,653 pending payments but no completed revenue.
